member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.VirtualFuse.IVirtualFuseDataAnalysis
member.summary: This interface is used to call for additional logic for virtual fuse data analysis purposes.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.VirtualFuse.IVirtualFuseDataAnalysis.WillHcsFitIntoDescriptorGap(System.String,System.String,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Evaluate HCS generated by FuseManager's VirtualFuseHandler to fit into the specified descriptor gap fuse.
member.param: The HCS generated by FuseManager Service.
The threshold of the evaluation in percentage.
member.returns: True if the data fits into the gap.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.VirtualFuse.IVirtualFuseDataAnalysis.WillFdsFitIntoDataGap(System.String,System.String,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Evaluate FDS generated by FuseManager's VirtualFuseHandler to fit into the specified descriptor gap fuse.
member.param: The FDS generated by FuseManager Service.
The threshold of the evaluation in percentage.
member.returns: True if the data fits into the gap.
